purpose: Restore the current Savingio state without asking the user to reconstruct memory.
authority_order: GitHub main actual files and latest commit
required_boot_steps: read the five official MASTER LOG files in order
compare log baseline with latest main
inspect actual files for failures and pending work
repair stale logs before new development
continue from the verified next action
forbidden_regressions: treating ZIP as the official source
claiming GitHub write access is unavailable without checking
asking the user to reconstruct completed history
using old workflow guidance over current repository evidence
